Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.notification

Interface Listener<T>

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractMeanObservationTableModel, AbstractModelObservationTableModel, PhaseParameterDialog, PhasePlotMeanObservationTableModel, PhasePlotModelObservationTableModel, RawDataMeanObservationTableModel, RawDataModelObservationTableModel
public interface Listener<T>
A listener interface genericised on the class of object that will be sent by the notifier. This is a simpler, more flexible, and more type-safe form of the Observer pattern than the one provided via the standard Java Observer/Observable framework. A good candidate for T is an enum.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canBeRemoved()
    Informs the caller whether this listener can be removed.
    void
    update(T info)
    The method that is called back by the notifier whose activities this listener is interested in.

  • Method Details

    • update

      The method that is called back by the notifier whose activities this listener is interested in.
      Parameters:
      info - The type-safe information.

    • canBeRemoved

      boolean canBeRemoved()
      Informs the caller whether this listener can be removed.
      Returns:
      A boolean denoting whether this listener can be removed.
